{{Infobox book
| name = Ghostwater
| slug = cradle-05-ghostwater
| precedes = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
| follows = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
| cover = [[File:Cover-cradle-05-ghostwater.jpg|250px]]
| released = 2023
| publisher = Hidden Gnome Publishing
}}

== Plot summary ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The story begins with the fall of [[Mu Enkai]], a former servant who rose to power via a mysterious egg, only to be destroyed by a [[Skysworn]] apprentice. In the aftermath of such power shifts, [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] are detained by the [[Skysworn]] in [[Stormrock]]; while [[Yerin]] is restrained due to her [[Blood Shadow]], [[Lindon]], his turtle [[Orthos]], and [[Renfei]] are assigned a mission to scout [[Ghostwater]], an unstable pocket world created by the [[Monarch]] [[Northstrider]]. Upon entering through a [[jade]] portal, [[Lindon]]'s group is thrust into a chaotic battle among powerful [[Truegold]] strangers in an underwater bubble. Amidst the violence, [[Lindon]] manages to secure [[Renfei]]'s sapphire and escapes into the dark ocean with [[Orthos]] and a rescued [[Little Blue]].

As the [[jade]] portal is destroyed, [[Yerin]] engages in a fierce battle with [[Bai Rou]] before being restrained by [[Akura Lowgold]] [[Mercy]]. Meanwhile, Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius begins negotiating with [[Naru Saeya]] to secure an audience with [[the Emperor]] by offering his services to the [[Skysworn]]. [[Lindon]], exhausted and alone in a forest of giant sea-grass, uses the [[Eye of the Deep]] to find a stone tower, where he seals himself and [[Orthos]] inside just as a golden dragon-girl attempts to intercept him. Inside the tower, [[Lindon]] discovers a room of constructs and a well of invigorating purple liquid. There, he meets [[Dross]], a sentient memory [[construct]], and uses the elixirs{{!}}elixir to restore his clarity. [[Lindon]] subsequently uses his [[Soulsmith tools]] to bind [[Dross]] to the [[Eye of the Deep]] to aid in its repair.

While [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] seek information from the [[Sage]] [[Akura Charity]]—who provides a map to a second entrance into [[Ghostwater]]—[[Eithan]] and [[Naru Saeya]] engage in aerial combat against [[Redmoon Hall]] emissaries. Back in the pocket world, [[Lindon]] performs a risky [[Soulsmith]] operation to upgrade [[Dross]] and undergoes intense training to master the Void Dragon’s Dance{{!}}Void Dragon's Dance and refine his [[Path of Black Flame]]. This training culminates in a brutal battle against the dragon-girl [[Ekerinatoth]]; [[Lindon]] defeats her with a devastating [[Blackflame]] strike, though the victory leaves him heavily injured and triggers a rage among her kin.

[[Lindon]] eventually discovers a [[Spirit Well]], where the water allows him to rapidly advance his [[Blackflame madra]] to [[Highgold]] and enables [[Dross]] to evolve. During this time, he studies [[dream tablets]] to develop a new movement technique called the [[Soul Cloak]]. However, his progress is interrupted when [[Akura Harmony]] uses a new [[Eye of the Deep]] to forcibly steal [[Dross]], leaving [[Lindon]] wounded. Driven by the need to recover his companion, [[Lindon]] advances to [[Truegold]] and tracks [[Harmony]] to a central chamber where a projection of [[Northstrider]] reveals the purpose of the [[Eyes of the Deep]].

Simultaneously, [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] face escalating dangers on the island, eventually achieving [[Truegold]] status during a fight against [[dragons]] before being interrupted by a mysterious witness of the [[Beast King]]. In a climactic confrontation, [[Lindon]] engages [[Harmony]] in a fierce battle. Using a concoction of various Well waters to complete [[Northstrider]]'s project, [[Lindon]] merges [[Dross]] into his own soul. Empowered by this union, he defeats [[Harmony]] and rescues [[Dross]]. The story concludes with [[Lindon]] reuniting with [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] after his advancement to [[Truegold]], while [[Eithan]] successfully negotiates a position with the [[Skysworn]] to train Underlord{{!}}Underlords in preparation for an upcoming competition between [[Monarchs]].}}

== Chapter-by-chapter ==
* '''Chapter 1:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|After discovering a mysterious egg that grants him immense power, a former servant named [[Mu Enkai]] rises to dominance and rules over a town with fear. His reign is interrupted by the arrival of a [[Skysworn]] apprentice, whom Mu Enkai{{!}}Enkai mistakenly underestimates and subsequently attacks with lethal force. The confrontation escalates as the apprentice reveals a much greater power, ultimately destroying Mu Enkai{{!}}Enkai and his egg, leaving only ashes behind.}}
* '''Chapter 2:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|After returning to [[Stormrock]], [[Lindon]] is detained by the [[Skysworn]] while [[Yerin]] is interrogated and restrained due to her [[Blood Shadow]]. The group, which includes the [[Akura Lowgold]] [[Mercy]], is assigned a mission to scout [[Ghostwater]], an unstable pocket world created by the [[Monarch]] [[Northstrider]]. The chapter concludes with [[Lindon]], his turtle [[Orthos]], and [[Renfei]] stepping through a [[jade]] portal to enter the pocket world.}}
* '''Chapter 3:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|After stepping through a portal into an underwater bubble, [[Lindon]] and his companions encounter several powerful [[Truegold]] strangers, including a [[dragon]]-woman and a man with emerald horns. A sudden, lethal attack from a meditating young man causes [[Renfei]] to fall, sparking a chaotic battle among the powerful combatants. Amidst the violence, [[Lindon]] manages to secure [[Renfei]]'s sapphire and escapes through the bubble into the dark ocean with [[Orthos]] and a rescued [[Little Blue]].}}
* '''Chapter 4:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|After the [[jade]] portal is destroyed, [[Yerin]] engages in a fierce battle with [[Bai Rou]], eventually being restrained by [[Mercy]] and surrounded by various powerful factions descending upon the island. Meanwhile, other [[sacred artists]] like [[Yan Shoumei]], [[Ekerinatoth]], and [[Akura Harmony]] abandon the truce to pursue their own interests in the chaotic environment. In [[Blackflame City]], [[Eithan]] negotiates with [[Naru Saeya]] to secure an audience with [[the Emperor]] by offering his services to the [[Skysworn]].}}
* '''Chapter 5:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|After escaping through a bubble into a forest of giant sea-grass, an exhausted [[Lindon]] uses the [[Eye of the Deep]] to locate a stone tower. He is forced to defend the unconscious [[Orthos]] from predatory fish, eventually being aided by a golden dragon-girl who arrives to fight the creatures. [[Lindon]] uses his remaining [[madra]] to activate a keyhole in the tower, sealing himself and [[Orthos]] inside a tunnel just as the dragon-girl attempts to intercept him.}}
* '''Chapter 6:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|After waking up alone and injured in a [[Monarch]]'s pocket world, [[Lindon]] explores a series of storage rooms until he discovers a room filled with constructs and a well of invigorating purple liquid. He meets [[Dross]], a sentient memory [[construct]] that gained intelligence from the well, and uses the liquid to restore his own mental clarity. [[Lindon]] collects vials of the elixirs{{!}}elixir and decides to use his [[Soulsmith tools]] to bind [[Dross]] to the [[Eye of the Deep]] to aid in its repair and navigation.}}
* '''Chapter 7:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] visit the black fortress of [[Akura Charity]], a [[Sage]] who reveals that [[Lindon]] is likely alive inside [[Ghostwater]] and provides [[Yerin]] with a map to a second entrance. Meanwhile, [[Eithan]] and [[Naru Saeya]] engage in a fierce aerial battle against [[Redmoon Hall]] emissaries, utilizing a powerful new compound launcher construct to incapacitate an [[Underlord]]. The chapter highlights the growing tensions and preparations for a larger upcoming tournament among the world's powers.}}
* '''Chapter 8:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] successfully performs a risky [[Soulsmith]] operation to merge the [[Dross]] [[construct]] with the [[Eye of the Deep]], resulting in an upgraded, more perceptive version of [[Dross]]. After receiving intelligence from [[Dross]] about the [[dragon]] [[Ekeri]] waiting outside, [[Lindon]] follows [[Orthos]]'s advice to hunt a large fish for meat while practicing his veiling techniques. However, the hunt becomes loud and violent, forcing [[Lindon]] to use [[Blackflame]] to kill a second beast, leaving him exhausted and potentially exposed as he attempts to return to the cave.}}
* '''Chapter 9:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|After a failed attempt to escape, [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]] retreat into the tunnels where they consume [[Silverfang Carp]] meat to recover and strengthen their bodies. Under [[Orthos]]'s guidance, [[Lindon]] spends two weeks in intense training to master the Void Dragon’s Dance{{!}}Void Dragon's Dance and refine his [[Path of Black Flame]]. The chapter concludes with [[Lindon]] preparing for a final, decisive confrontation against the [[dragon]] [[Ekeri]] to secure their escape.}}
* '''Chapter 10:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] engages in a brutal battle against the dragon-girl [[Ekerinatoth]], eventually using a devastating Void Dragon’s Dance{{!}}Void Dragon's Dance technique to destroy the surrounding environment and defeat her. Although [[Lindon]] survives with heavy injuries, [[Ekerinatoth]] dies from a [[Blackflame]] strike to the heart, leaving behind her jewelry and a fractured reality. Her sister, Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara, discovers the body and, recognizing the [[Blackflame]] signature, leads her kin in a roar of rage against the Black dragons{{!}}black dragons.}}
* '''Chapter 11:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] navigate a dangerous island trek, facing various obstacles and delays while [[Yerin]] uses the time to meditate on her master's [[Endless Sword]] technique. As they approach their destination, a massive [[dragon]] presence and a fading blue barrier signal shifting tensions on the island. Meanwhile, [[Lindon]] prepares to leave his decaying pocket-world habitat using a newly discovered [[void key]] for storage, setting out toward the [[Spirit Well]] despite the threat of [[Diamondscale Sea Drakes]].}}
* '''Chapter 12:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|While swimming toward a new habitat, [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]] are attacked by a Diamondscale Sea Drakes{{!}}Diamondscale Sea Drake, leading to a chaotic battle that spills into a dream tablet library. A weary [[Truegold]] named [[Ziel]] intervenes, killing the massive serpent with a single hammer blow before moving toward a [[Spirit Well]]. [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]] follow him to the well, where [[Lindon]] discovers that its water possesses immense power to refine his [[madra]] and strengthen his channels.}}
* '''Chapter 13:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] utilizes the [[Spirit Well]] to rapidly advance his [[Blackflame madra]] to [[Highgold]], while allowing [[Dross]] to inhabit his core to consume the well's power. To further his development, [[Lindon]] studies various [[dream tablets]] to find new techniques for his [[Path of Twin Stars]]. After [[Ziel]] gifts him an [[Archlord]]'s dream tablets{{!}}dream tablet, [[Lindon]] successfully develops a new movement technique called the [[Soul Cloak]].}}
* '''Chapter 14:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]], a wounded emissary of [[Redmoon Hall]], is confronted and ultimately killed by Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius in a single combat duel. Meanwhile, [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] attempt to escape an island by fighting through [[dragons]], only to be intercepted by a furious dragon Underlady. Despite [[Mercy]] using a powerful technique from her The Book of Eternal Night{{!}}Book of Eternal Night to shield them, both girls are severely burned and must flee into the woods to survive.}}
* '''Chapter 15:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|After advancing to [[Highgold]] and helping [[Dross]] evolve into a more living spirit using [[Dreamseeds]], [[Lindon]] moves to the [[Life Well habitat]], where the water restores [[Orthos]]'s youth and vitality. While exploring the facility, [[Lindon]] is confronted by [[Akura Harmony]], who uses a new [[Eye of the Deep]] to forcibly claim [[Dross]]. The encounter ends with [[Harmony]] escaping through a hatch, taking the [[construct]] with him and leaving [[Lindon]] wounded.}}
* '''Chapter 16:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|After the [[Akura Harmony]] steals [[Dross]], [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]] decide to pursue him rather than escape [[Ghostwater]] using a [[gatestone]]. [[Lindon]] advances to the [[Truegold]] stage with [[Orthos]]'s help, repairs his arm, and breaks through the habitat's hatch to track [[Harmony]]. As they reach the central chamber, they encounter a projection of [[Northstrider]] explaining the purpose of the [[Eyes of the Deep]] just as [[Harmony]] prepares to use a second [[Eye]] at the metal tree.}}
* '''Chapter 17:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Seeking to advance to [[Truegold]], [[Yerin]] engages in a dangerous battle against a [[Highgold]] [[dragon]] and an approaching [[Truegold dragon]] while [[Mercy]] provides support. During the intense combat, [[Yerin]] successfully achieves her advancement to [[Truegold]], but they are soon cornered by the vengeful [[Underlady]]. The conflict is interrupted by the arrival of a mysterious witness of the [[Beast King]], prompting the [[Underlady]]'s retainers to forcibly retreat with her.}}
* '''Chapter 18:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]] engage in a fierce battle against [[Harmony]], an [[Akura]] who uses Shadow{{!}}shadow techniques and violet crystal armor. During the fight, [[Lindon]] rescues [[Dross]] from the [[Eyes of the Deep]] and uses a concoction of various Well waters to complete [[Northstrider]]'s project, merging [[Dross]] into his own soul. Empowered by this union and [[Dross]]'s tactical guidance, [[Lindon]] successfully executes a plan to strip [[Harmony]] of his armor and defeat him.}}
* '''Chapter 19:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] accompanies [[Fisher Gesha]] to an audience with [[Emperor Naru Huan]], where [[the Emperor]] rewards her for her service but denies her request to pass her gifts to her family. Following the audience, [[Eithan]] negotiates with [[the Emperor]] to join the [[Skysworn]] to train young Underlord{{!}}Underlords in preparation for an upcoming competition between [[Monarchs]]. Meanwhile, [[Lindon]] reunites with [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] on an island after his successful advancement to [[Truegold]], while the [[Monarch]] [[Northstrider]] salvages data from the collapsing [[Ghostwater]] pocket world.}}

== Characters ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ziel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Harmony]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Renfei]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Harmony]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mu Enkai]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekerinatoth]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Beast King]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Fisher Gesha]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Charity]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Sopharanatoth]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Old Man Lo]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Derianatoth]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Chon Ma]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yan Shoumei]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|dragon-girl}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[the stranger (Cradle)]]}}

== Locations & groups ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura clan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Redmoon Hall]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Spirit Well]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Blackflame Empire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Arelius family]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Life Well]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[sacred beasts]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Trackless Sea]]}}

== Abilities & sacred arts ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Enforcer technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Burning Cloak]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Striker technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Endless Sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Path of Black Flame]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[soulfire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[black dragon's breath]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Soul Cloak]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Goldsign]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[script-circle]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Forged madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Forger technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Void Dragon’s Dance]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[water aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[hunger madra]]}}

== Artifacts & constructs ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eye of the Deep]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Thousand-Mile Cloud]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dream Well]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[void key]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Sylvan Riverseed]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eclipse]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Remnant]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[gatestone]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|sapphire}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Spirit Well water]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Suriel's glass bead]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[dream tablets]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|the egg}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eye]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dream Well water]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eyes of the Deep]]}}

== Events & concepts ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Blackflame]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Skysworn]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Blood Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Truegold]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lowgold]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Silverfang Carp]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Highgold]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Underlady]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[pure madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Striker]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Diamondscale Sea Drakes]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[dragons]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bleeding Phoenix]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Monarch]]}}

== Sources ==
* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cradle
* https://openlibrary.org/works/OL35275908W

{{Willverse books nav}}

[[Category:Books]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
